data.name: Fantasex Chronicles
data.detailed_description:
Dive into Fantasex Chronicles, where fantasy races collide with the modern world in a whirlwind of lustful chaos!

Orcs, elves, tieflings, and succubi trade their swords for briefcases, working real jobs—personal trainers, reporters, executives, and waitresses—in a realm of skyscrapers, diners, and gyms. But when the workday ends, these characters unleash their primal desires in outrageous, steamy encounters. From a sultry interview in a photo studio to a demonic pact in a high-rise office, every map offers a new tale of seduction and fetish-fueled fun. Will you join the fantasy workforce and surrender to temptation?

Once the story unfolds, it’s time to get hands-on! Engage in explicit, customizable sex scenes with multiple poses, including exclusives tailored to each scenario. Unleash your wildest desires with features like spanking, blowjobs, boob jiggle, waist or head grabs, threesomes, and gags—all designed to satisfy your fantasy fetish! The more pleasure you deliver, the more your Intensity Meter rises. Fill it to unlock the epic Finisher Moneyshot, with a variety of steamy options to choose from.

  • 5 Stories and location to choose from , or customize it your own way.

  • Engage in full lustful intercourse with either one or two partners.

  • Use your mouse, VR controllers to interact with the characters.

  • Select different poses to keep things interesting for you and your partner.

  • Playful spanking both in PC or VR.

  • Reach climax by choosing the right moves!

data.short_description: Fantasex Chronicles: Fantasy races—orcs, elves, succubi—work modern jobs as trainers, reporters, and executives. Their days erupt into explicit, pornographic encounters in diners, gyms, and skyscrapers. Dive into a world of raw, uncensored lust!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1 64 bit or greater
  • 處理器: Intel i5-4590 equivalent or greater
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 970 or AMD R9 390 equivalent or greater
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: Quest, Rift, Vive and Index are supported
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: Intel i5-6500 equivalent or greater
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1080 or AMD R9 390 equivalent or greater
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: Quest, Rift, Vive and Index are supported

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 SP1 64 bit or greater
  • Processor: Intel i5-4590 equivalent or greater
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 970 or AMD R9 390 equivalent or greater
  • Storage: 6 GB available space
  • VR Support: Quest, Rift, Vive and Index are supported
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 11
  • Processor: Intel i5-6500 equivalent or greater
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 1080 or AMD R9 390 equivalent or greater

  • VR Support: Quest, Rift, Vive and Index are supported
